# Available Exports — What You Can Use from Previous Atoms

This file is auto-generated as atoms complete. It shows all functions, classes, variables, and types available for use by subsequent atoms.

**Update frequency:** Auto-generated after each atom completes (Layer 1, 2, 3, etc.)

**How to use this:**
- When building an atom, check this file to see what's already available
- Import from the listed modules instead of reimplementing
- If something is missing, check if that atom's dependency is complete
- Never assume a module exists — it must be listed here

**Tree structure:**
- 📦 **Module name** — Major functional area
  - [ATOM-ID] — Which atom provides these exports
    - 🔷 **class** — Class definition
    - ⚙️ **function** — Function definition
    - 📌 **constant** — Module-level constant
    - 🏷️ **type** — Type or interface definition
